questions.q: What is the capital of Canada?
What is 12 × 9?

Which planet has the most known moons?
What sport is played at Wimbledon?
How many sides does a hexagon have?
In which country is the Eiffel Tower?
What is 144 ÷ 12?
What is the chemical symbol for sodium?
What is the official language of Brazil?
What do you call a baby dog?
What color is an orange?
How many fingers are on one hand?
What do you wear on your feet?
What is 3 - 1?
Which animal says 'meow'?
What is the opposite of hot?
What do birds use to fly?
What do you use to write on paper?
What is 7 - 3?
In which year did World War II begin?
What is the capital of Russia?
What is the chemical formula for table salt?
Who developed the theory of general relativity?
What is the largest country by land area?
How many events are in a decathlon?
Which gas makes up most of Earth's atmosphere?
Which ocean is the smallest by area?
Who wrote 'Pride and Prejudice'?
What gas do plants primarily use in photosynthesis?
In the analytic continuation of the Riemann zeta function, what is the value of ζ(−1)?
What is the Gibbs free energy condition for a spontaneous reaction at constant T and P?
How many elements does the dihedral group D₄ — the symmetry group of a square — have?
What is the ground state energy of a particle in a 1D infinite square well of width L?
What is the Laplace transform of f(t) = t·e^(at)?
In how many distinct ways can 5 different books be arranged on a shelf?
What is always true of the entropy of mixing of two distinct ideal gases at constant T and P?
choices: It equals the enthalpy of mixing

questions.q: How many edges does a tree with n vertices have?
What is the curvature κ of a circle of radius r?
In the Standard Model, which particle mediates the electromagnetic force?
What is the next letter in the sequence: O, T, T, F, F, S, S, E, N, ___?
You enter a dark room containing a candle, an oil lamp, and a wood stove. You have exactly one match. What do you light first?
Two fathers and two sons sit down to eat eggs. There are exactly 3 eggs, and each person eats exactly one whole egg. How?
choices: There are only 3 people: grandfather, father, and son

questions.q: Which is heavier: a ton of gold or a ton of feathers?
choices: Gold — precious metals use heavier units of measure

questions.q: What is the minimum number of socks you must take (without looking) from a drawer of 10 red and 10 blue socks to guarantee a matching pair?
I have no mouth yet I speak; I have no ears yet I hear. What am I?
A cowboy rides into town on Friday, stays exactly 3 days, and leaves on Friday. How is this possible?
choices: He misremembers which days he stayed
There is a holiday called Friday in his country

questions.q: What is the next number in the sequence: 1, 11, 21, 1211, 111221?
I buy a painting for $70 and sell it for $80. I then buy it back for $90 and sell it again for $100. What is my total profit?
Rearrange the letters N, E, W, D, O, O, R to make one word.
